name: Chocolate Spiders
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Twizzlers into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Slice each piece in half lengthwise.
3. On waxed paper, place four legs (pieces) on each side.
4. Drop one teaspoon of melted candy in the middle for the body.
5. Use a toothpick to smooth the mixture into a uniform circle and connect all candy pieces.
6. Cool completely before removing from waxed paper.
